response.step_by_step_log: 1. I reviewed the entire video to detect any instances of vocal music or singing. 2. The video consists of a promotional trailer for the 'Secret Society holoX 4th Anniversary', which includes cinematic musical themes, background music for skits, and voiceover/spoken dialogue by the characters. 3. I confirmed that all music tracks throughout the video are instrumental. There is no vocal singing by any of the performers. 4. Since no vocal music exists in the video, I have marked all scenes with 'contains_vocal_music: false' and left the lyric and artist fields null.
response.global_summary: A promotional trailer and announcement video for the 'Secret Society holoX 4th Anniversary', featuring character introductions, cinematic-style skits, merchandise promotion, and an upcoming event announcement. The video contains background instrumental music and Japanese spoken dialogue, but no vocal music/singing.

scenes.description: Video begins with an intro screen titled 'SSholoX 4th ANNIV'.
Cinematic introduction of the four members: La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha.
Cinematic trailer skit depicting the characters in a dramatic space setting.
The characters briefly appear and speak to the camera to celebrate the anniversary.
A mystery-themed skit taking place inside a mansion.
The members talk to the camera again about the skits.
Display of 'holoX tower invasion' event information.
Final warning from Hakui Koyori regarding the anniversary hashtag.
